name: Acme Continental
description_short: Acme Continental Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union offering checking, savings, lending, and Visa card products to members in the Illinois area.
description_long:
Acme Continental Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative headquartered in Riverdale, Illinois. The institution serves members through a traditional credit union model, emphasizing member services and community banking. Their main branch is located at 13601 S. Perry Ave. in Riverdale, with access to additional locations and shared branching networks.

The credit union offers a comprehensive range of deposit and lending products. On the deposit side, they provide checking and debit card accounts, savings accounts, Club savings products, and certificate of deposit (CD) and individual retirement account (IRA) options with published deposit rates. For borrowing, they offer personal loans, VISA Platinum credit cards, and VISA balance transfer options. Members can access funds through surcharge-free ATMs, shared branches, and wire transfer services.

Acme Continental distinguishes itself through modern digital banking capabilities, including a recently upgraded online banking platform and a mobile app available through standard app stores. They offer Zelle integration for peer-to-peer transfers and provide financial calculators to help members plan. The institution emphasizes member security with clear communication about fraud prevention and phishing scams, explicitly stating they will never request account information via unsolicited calls, emails, or texts.

As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, membership eligibility applies, though the website encourages potential members to inquire about joining. The institution appears to serve a regional membership base primarily in Illinois. While the website demonstrates standard credit union services and modern technology adoption, specific details on membership requirements, fee structures (beyond referencing a fee schedule), and competitive rate positioning are not prominently detailed in the available web content.
services: Savings accounts and Club savings products
Mobile banking and online banking platform
pros: Surcharge-free ATM network access for members
Shared branching services extending physical access beyond main location
Recently upgraded online banking system with demo videos available
Mobile banking app available through standard app stores
Zelle integration for fast peer-to-peer money transfers
VISA balance transfer promotional rate (4.9% APR for 12 months, Jan-Apr 2026)
Strong fraud prevention messaging and security protocols
cons: Limited geographic reach—appears to serve primarily Illinois area membership
Membership eligibility requirements not clearly detailed on website
Specific interest rates and APRs for deposit and loan products not displayed on main pages
No information provided about membership fees or account maintenance costs
Limited transparency on loan approval criteria or maximum loan amounts
best_for: Illinois-area residents seeking traditional credit union banking with modern digital tools
Members prioritizing security and fraud prevention in their banking relationship
Consumers interested in VISA balance transfer options with promotional rates
diagnosis: Acme Continental Credit Union is best for Illinois-based individuals seeking member-owned banking with modern digital capabilities and fraud-conscious operations. Primary caveat: membership eligibility and location restrictions apply, and specific rates and fees require direct inquiry or accessing their fee schedule.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
